---
title: "Founding Members"
description: |
  Meet the founding members of Get Learn Bioinformatics — dedicated researchers, educators, and innovators driving our mission to make bioinformatics education accessible to all.
listing:
  - id: MAA
    max-description-length: 500
    image-height: 200px
    fields: [title, description, image]
    contents: 
      - maa   
    type: default
    grid-item-border: false
    sort-ui: false
    filter-ui: false

  - id: RTN
    max-description-length: 500
    image-height: 200px
    fields: [title, description, image]
    contents: 
      - rtn 
    type: default
    grid-item-border: false
    sort-ui: false
    sort: "priority asc"
    filter-ui: false
  - id: MEH
    max-description-length: 500
    image-height: 200px
    fields: [title, description, image]
    contents: 
      - meh
    type: default
    grid-item-border: false
    sort-ui: false
    sort: "priority asc"
    filter-ui: false
  - id: CNA
    max-description-length: 500
    image-height: 200px
    fields: [title, description, image]
    contents: 
      - cna
    type: default
    grid-item-border: false
    sort-ui: false
    sort: "priority asc"
    filter-ui: false
---

## Md Al Amin

::: {#MAA}
:::

## Rahnuma Tabassum

::: {#RTN}
:::

## Mir Ehsanul Haque

::: {#MEH}
:::

## Chinmoy Nandi

::: {#CNA}
:::
